changelog: FIX (DVR playback black screen) — Tapping a completed Cloud-DVR recording opened the player but stayed on a black screen forever despite ExoPlayer downloading bytes. Root cause: DVR stream URLs have NO file extension and the server intentionally rejects HEAD requests, so MediaSourceFactory's content-type sniff couldn't pick the Mp4Extractor. Now we explicitly hint MimeTypes.VIDEO_MP4 on DVR MediaItems so the right extractor wires up immediately. Applied to both TV and Mobile players.

NEW — Long-press OK on any live channel now offers a third action: Record now / Stop recording. Same record-now semantics as the player OSD's REC chip — captures up to 1 hour by default, auto-clamps to the end of the currently-airing EPG show when known. Mirrored on the Mobile long-press sheet. Recordings show up in My Recordings just like before.
